violations.description: Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. -Pop hose laying on the floor.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Tops of presses up front are dusty. Ceiling lights and vents have dust buildup.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Tops of presses and warming equipment up front has dust buildup.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Vent hood is starting to build up grease and dust.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
